adapters.name: noop
adapters.description: No-operation adapter. Safe bypass, always exits 0.

adapters.name: logging
adapters.description: Writes minimal hook event log to logDir. No network call.

adapters.name: audit
adapters.description: Writes redacted audit log to logDir. Secrets patterns are stripped before write.

adapters.name: external-placeholder
adapters.description: Placeholder for future third-party integrations. Default OFF. No network call is made.
